overall.description: A slow panoramic sweep through a dimly lit rustic cottage interior rendered in a game engine, showcasing a stone fireplace, wooden staircase, and vintage furniture. The footage features cinematic lighting with warm candlelight tones and detailed traditional wooden architecture.

agents.ego_description: slowly panning the view rightward across the room, examining the stone fireplace and left wall details

entered.detail: large stone hearth with rough masonry and warm firelight glow
steep wooden staircase with simple railings leading to upper floor
wicker baskets suspended from wooden ceiling beams
wooden shelves mounted on the left wall holding various items
large ornate circular rug covering the wooden floor
closed wooden door at the end of the hallway
blue metal rack or stand near the fireplace

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the left side of a cozy cottage interior, dominated by a large stone fireplace with a warm glow. The camera slowly pans right, revealing wooden ceiling beams, hanging baskets, and a steep staircase leading upward, all rendered with detailed textures and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cottage seating area with vintage furniture

events.description: camera pan reveals the right side of the room with cream sofa and ornate lighting fixtures

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan right to survey the seating area and vintage furnishings on the right side of the room

entered.detail: vintage cream-colored tufted sofa with decorative dark pillows
ornate hanging lamp with multiple candle-style lights and metal framework
tall wooden bookshelf filled with books against the right wall
brass floor lamp with glowing shade next to the sofa
small wooden table with white teapot and cups in front of the sofa

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning right, the focus shifts to a vintage cream-colored sofa adorned with decorative pillows and an ornate chandelier above. The stone fireplace recedes to the left while a wooden bookshelf and brass floor lamp come into view, completing the cozy, lived-in atmosphere of the cottage interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, continuous pan across a rustic cottage interior that shifts from the warmth of a hearth to a cozy, furnished living area. It begins on the left side of the room, centered on a large stone fireplace casting a warm glow against detailed wooden ceiling beams and hanging baskets. As the camera glides to the right, the fireplace recedes to reveal a steep wooden staircase leading upward into the atmospheric light. The scene then expands to showcase a vintage cream-colored sofa with decorative pillows beneath an ornate chandelier, before finally settling on a wooden bookshelf and a brass floor lamp that complete the lived-in space.
